scripts.build:mobile:android:apk: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile android-apk
scripts.build:mobile:android:store: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile android-store
scripts.build:mobile:ios:simulator: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile ios-simulator
scripts.build:mobile:ios:device: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile ios-device
scripts.build:mobile:ios:store: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile ios-store
scripts.build:mobile:store: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform all --profile store
